lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Hey there adventurer, I am the Ranged combat tutor. Is there anything you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I train my Ranged?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: To start with you'll need a bow and arrows, you were given a Shortbow and some arrows when you arrived here from Tutorial island.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Alternatively, you can claim a training bow and some arrows from me.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Mikasi, the Magic Combat tutor and I both give out items every 30 minutes, however you must choose whether you want runes or ranged equipment.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: To claim the Training bow and arrows, right-click on me and choose Claim, to claim runes right-click on the Magic Combat tutor and select Claim.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Not all bows can use every type of arrow, most bows have a limit. You can find out your bows limit by checking the Ranged skill guide.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you do decide to use the Training bow, you will only be able to use the Training arrows with it. Remember to pick up your arrows, re-use them and come back when you need more.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Once you have your bow and arrows, equip them by selecting their Wield option in your inventory.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You can change the way you attack by going to the combat options tab. There are three attack styles for bows. Those styles are Accurate, Rapid and Longrange.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Accurate increases your bows attack accuracy. Rapid will increase your attack speed with the bow. Longrange will let you attack your enemies from a greater distance.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you need some more advice, you should talk to Adventurer Jon about Adventure paths. He may even have a handy starter kit you can use.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You should know the basics of ranged combat by now, but if you are looking for somewhere to test your skills and make some money, you should try hunting Moss giants in Varrock sewers.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you are lucky you might find a Mossy key, with this key you will be able to enter Bryophyta's lair. Make sure to bring plenty of food and good armour and weapons when you fight her as you will need it.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If your lucky you might snag some goodies that you can sell for a decent profit.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you are looking to do something different, visit the ranging guild over near Hemenster, there you can practice your archery and earn tickets for it at the same time.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You can then hand those tickets in for a variety of goods you can use to train your Ranged skill.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you are ever in the market for a new bow or some arrows, you should head on over to Lowe's Archery Emporium in Varrock. I can show you where the shop is if you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Ahh the art of fletching. Fletching is used to create your own bow and arrows.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: To create your bow and arrows you would need to gather some wood, feathers, arrow heads and bow string. The wood would be to make arrow shafts which can be turned into unstrung bows and arrow shafts.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Unfortunately, Fletching is a member only skill so you will have to get your ranging supplies from shops or other players.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: It's quite simple really. You'll need an axe to cut some logs from trees and a knife. Knives can be found in and around the Lumbridge castle and in the Varrock General store upstairs.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Use your knife on the logs. This will bring up a menu listing items you can fletch.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: For arrows you will need to smith some arrow heads and kill some chickens for feathers.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Add the feathers to your Arrow shafts to make Headless arrows, then use your chosen arrow heads on the Headless arrows to make your arrows.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Now for making bows. When accessing the fletching menu, instead of choosing Arrows shafts, you can make an unstrung bow instead.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: To complete the bow you will need to get your hands on a Bow string.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: First you will need to get some flax from a flax field. There's one south of Seers' Village. Gather flax, then spin it on a spinning wheel, there's one in Seers' Village too.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: This makes bow strings which you can then use on the unstrung bows to make a working bow!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Brilliant. If I forget anything I'll come talk to you again.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Certainly. If you pick up ammo that is the same ammo you are currently using, I can make that ammo automatically equip for you, providing you have space of course!

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Or you can leave it to going into your inventory like normal.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: There you go! Your ammo will now automatically be equipped when you pick it up.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: There you go! Your ammo will now go to your inventory when you pick it up.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you want to know?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: I work with the Magic tutor to give out consumable items that you may need for combat such as arrows and runes. However we have had some cheeky people try to take both!

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: So, every half an hour, you may come back and claim either arrows OR runes, but not both. Come back in a while for arrows, or simply buy some.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you had any room in your pack I'd give you a training bow. That's a shame. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You already have some training arrows.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you had enough space in your inventory I'd give you some training arrows, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You already have a training bow.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: If you had any room in your pack I'd give you a training bow. That's a shame. Come back when you do. If you had enough space in your inventory I'd give you some training arrows, come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Hey there adventurer, I am the Ranged combat tutor. Is there anything you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a starter pack?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Here you go. One starter pack. Enjoy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could you stop me receiving a starter pack after respawn?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Yes, I can help with that.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: You'll no longer receive a starter pack after respawn. Talk to me again if you change your mind.

sections.title: Using items on Ranged combat tutor

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I no longer need my Training arrows, would you like it back?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Sure thing, I can give this to another adventurer who is in need of training.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I no longer need my Training bow, would you like it back?

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: Sure thing, I can give this to another adventurer who is in need of training.

lines.speaker: Ranged combat tutor
lines.text: I have no use for that, sorry.
